features: LYNX Sunset Fresh Trio Gift Set includes a LYNX Sunset Fresh body spray, body wash, and antiperspirant
Leaves him smelling irresistible with a refreshing mango and mandarin fragrance
The body wash washes away odour-causing bacteria, giving his skin a fresh and clean feel
The body spray features even more odour-busting zinc technology to give him 48 hours of all-over freshness
The antiperspirant deodorant keeps him cool no matter what while protecting his clothes from white marks and stains
Perfect for any occasion, these gifts for him are the ultimate Father’s Day present, secret Santa surprise or all-year-round gift
description: Product Description So, it’s gift-giving time again. The age-old question, ‘What will I get him?’ Relax. The answer’s simple. Time to take the guesswork out of getting it right and grab the LYNX Sunset Fresh Trio Gift Set. Teaming full-size LYNX Sunset Fresh Body Wash, Body Spray and Antiperspirant together, this set of gifts for him has got him covered with the greatest fragrance of all time, featuring mandarin and mango notes. The body wash kicks odour to the kerb and leaves him smelling irresistibly fresh for up to 12 hours. Plus, it contains moisturisers to hydrate his skin every time he showers. With just a few spritzes of our men's deodorant body spray, he’ll have 48 hours of freshness and unbeatable confidence. We’re out here working smarter, not harder, with an aluminium-free formula that boasts even more odour-busting zinc technology than before. The antiperspirant delivers 72 hours of invisible sweat protection, helping him keep his white shirts white and black shirts black for longer. These gifts for men will help him stay at the top of his game and have the confidence to be the best version of the only thing he can be: himself.  Son, brother, husband, dad, uncle, cousin… whoever you’re buying for, there’ll be no fake smiles or eye rolling when he opens this one because he’ll actually like it. And use it. And every time he does, he’ll remember the great gift you gave him. Probably. The point is, we know guys want to smell good, and that’s why our gift sets always hit the spot. Ingredients LYNX SUNSET FRESH BODYSPRAY 150ML INGREDIENTS: Alcohol Denat., Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Parfum, Zinc Neodecanoate, Isopropyl Myristate, Amyl Salicylate, Benzyl Alcohol, Citral, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Citrus Limon Peel Oil, Coumarin, Eugenol, Geraniol, Limonene, Linalool, Pinene, Terpinolene, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Vanillin. LYNX SUNSET FRESH BODYWASH 225ML INGREDIENTS: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Glycerin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Parfum, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Lactic Acid, Disodium EDTA, PPG-6, Saccharide Isomerate, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Citrus Limon Peel Oil, Geraniol, Limonene, Linalool, Pinene, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Vanillin, CI 17200, CI 19140. LYNX SUNSET FRESH APA 150ML INGREDIENTS: Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Isohexadecane, PPG-14 Butyl Ether, Aluminum Sesquichlorohydrate, Parfum, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Glycine, Calcium Chloride, Octyldodecanol, Propylene Carbonate, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, BHT, Amyl Salicylate, Benzyl Alcohol, Citral, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Citrus Limon Peel Oil, Coumarin, Eugenol, Geraniol, Limonene, Linalool, Pinene, Terpinolene, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Vanillin Directions Body Wash: Apply to wet skin, lather, and rinse off. Body Spray: Spray onto body or clothing for a refreshing scent. Antiperspirant: Apply to clean, dry underarms for sweat protection. Safety Warning LYNX SUNSET FRESH APA 150ML LYNX SUNSET FRESH BODYSPRAY 150ML DIRECTIONS: Shake well, hold can 15cm from the underarm and spray. CAUTION: Do not use on broken skin. Stop use if rash or irritation occurs. Avoid direct inhalation. Use in short bursts in well-ventilated places, avoid prolonged spraying. Do not spray near eyes. Use only as directed. LYNX SUNSET FRESH BODYWASH 225ML Shower Gel & Body and Face Wash & Body Scrubs Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. See more
